─[1]-Project──
lorehq
─[2]-Primitives──
Rules Skills Agents Fieldnotes Runbooks
─[3]-Guides──
CommandsCustomizationGuidesPlatform SupportWorking Across Repos
─[4]-Workflow──
Active Work Architecture
─[ Architecture Diagram ]─ ┐

Architecture Diagram

Brainstorm for a Lore architecture diagram — iterating on the Mermaid source.

flowchart TD

  %% ── Install Flow ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  subgraph INSTALL["Install Flow"]
    direction LR
    NPM["npx create-lore"]
    CREATE["create-lore\nnpm installer"]
    TEMPLATE["lore repo\nframework template\nNode.js hooks · lib · scripts\nskills · agents · docs scaffold"]
    INSTANCE["Lore Instance\noperator's cloned copy\n+ their own knowledge files"]

    NPM -->|"invokes"| CREATE
    CREATE -->|"clones template"| TEMPLATE
    TEMPLATE -->|"becomes"| INSTANCE
  end

  %% ── Instance internals ───────────────────────────────────────
  subgraph INST["Lore Instance Internals"]
    direction TB
    HOOKS["hooks/\nNode.js subprocess hooks"]
    LIB["lib/\nNode.js modules\nbanner.js · tracker.js · tree.js\nmemory-guard.js · linked-rewrite.js · config.js"]
    SKILLS[".lore/skills/\nMarkdown skill files"]
    KB["docs/knowledge/\nMarkdown knowledge base\n(persisted in git)"]
    INSTFILES["Generated instruction files\nCLAUDE.md\nopencode.json\n.cursor/rules/lore-*.mdc"]

    LIB -->|"used by"| HOOKS
  end

  INSTANCE -->|"contains"| INST

  %% ── Platform Integrations ────────────────────────────────────
  subgraph PLATFORMS["Platform Integrations"]
    direction LR

    subgraph CC["Claude Code"]
      direction TB
      CC1["SessionStart\nsession-init.js\ninjects session banner"]
      CC2["UserPromptSubmit\nprompt-preamble.js\nper-turn reminder"]
      CC3["PreToolUse\nprotect-memory.js\nframework-guard.js\nblocks MEMORY.md + framework file writes"]
      CC4["PostToolUse\nknowledge-tracker.js\ncontext-path-guide.js\ncapture nudges"]
    end

    subgraph OC["OpenCode"]
      direction TB
      OC1["chat.system.transform\nsession banner + per-turn reminder"]
      OC2["session.compacting\nre-inject banner after compaction"]
      OC3["tool.execute.before/after\nprotect-memory + knowledge-tracker"]
    end

    subgraph CUR["Cursor"]
      direction TB
      CUR1["sessionStart\nsession banner"]
      CUR2["afterFileEdit / afterShellExecution\nknowledge-tracker  silent"]
      CUR3["Read-blocking on MEMORY.md"]
    end
  end

  HOOKS -->|"subprocess JSON\nstdin/stdout"| CC
  HOOKS -->|"ESM long-lived\nplugins"| OC
  HOOKS -->|".cursor/hooks.json\nsubprocess"| CUR

  INSTFILES -->|"injected into"| CC
  INSTFILES -->|"injected into"| OC
  INSTFILES -->|"injected into"| CUR

  %% ── Capture Loop ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  subgraph CAPTURE["Capture Loop  -  Core Mechanic"]
    direction TB
    WORK["Agent does work"]
    FIRE["PostToolUse hook fires\nknowledge-tracker counts bash commands"]
    NUDGE["Capture nudge emitted\nremind agent to save knowledge"]
    WRITE["Agent writes\ndocs/knowledge/  or  .lore/skills/"]
    NEWSESSION["Next session starts"]
    READ["session-init.js reads\nknowledge base + builds docs tree"]
    BANNER["Session banner injected\nknowledge map · active work · delegation reminder"]

    WORK --> FIRE
    FIRE --> NUDGE
    NUDGE --> WRITE
    WRITE --> NEWSESSION
    NEWSESSION --> READ
    READ --> BANNER
    BANNER -->|"agent has persistent\ncontext  no vendor lock-in"| WORK
  end

  KB -->|"read by"| READ
  SKILLS -->|"read by"| READ
  WRITE --> KB
  WRITE --> SKILLS

  %% ── lore-docker sidecar ──────────────────────────────────────
  subgraph DOCKER["lore-docker  -  Optional Sidecar  -  lorehq/lore-docker on Docker Hub"]
    direction TB
    ENTRY["entrypoint.py\nstarts all services"]
    MKDOCS["MkDocs\ndocs UI"]
    SEM["semantic_server.py\nFastAPI  semantic search\nover knowledge base via embeddings"]
    WATCH["watcher.py\nwatches docs/ for file changes\nre-indexes on save"]
    NAV["nav_generator.py\nauto-generates MkDocs nav\nfrom docs/ structure"]

    ENTRY --> MKDOCS
    ENTRY --> SEM
    ENTRY --> WATCH
    ENTRY --> NAV
    WATCH -->|"triggers re-index"| SEM
    NAV -->|"updates nav"| MKDOCS
  end

  KB -->|"mounted into\nDocker volume"| DOCKER

  %% ── lore link ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  subgraph LORELINK["lore link"]
    direction LR
    HUB["Lore Hub Instance\ncentralized knowledge base"]
    WORKREPO["Work Repo\noperator's application code\nor infra repo"]
    LCFG["lightweight config\ndropped into work repo\nby lore link command"]
    REWRITE["linked-rewrite.js\nrepoints instruction file paths\nback to hub"]

    HUB -->|"lore link work-repo"| LCFG
    LCFG --> WORKREPO
    WORKREPO -->|"hooks fire in\nCursor / Claude Code"| REWRITE
    REWRITE -->|"knowledge base\nstays centralized"| HUB
  end

  %% ── lore-docs public site ────────────────────────────────────
  LOREDOCS["lore-docs\npublic documentation site\nMkDocs  -  GitHub Pages"]

  %% ── Cross-area connections ───────────────────────────────────
  INST -->|"hooks drive"| CAPTURE
  INST -->|"hooks drive"| PLATFORMS
PgUp/PgDn: scroll b: bulk commands q: quit x: menu ← → ↑ ↓: navigate
Donate 0.24.4
